strategy_summary: The binary is vulnerable to a buffer overflow in the main function. We can use this to leak a libc address via ret2libc and then call system('/bin/sh') to get a shell. The strategy involves finding the offset to control RIP, identifying gadgets such as pop rdi; ret, and locating the addresses of puts in the PLT and GOT, as well as the address of system and /bin/sh in libc.
